_comment: Canonical-subclass-slug → 2024 5e-bits-index slug map. Canonical carries the Foundry short `system.identifier` (berserker, lore, life); the 2024 5e-bits SRD oracle uses the long descriptive index (path-of-the-berserker, college-of-lore, life-domain). The 8 SRD subclasses whose two slug forms differ are aliased here so both test_subclasses_match_oracle and the class-check's subclass_identifiers comparison resolve full coverage. (champion/evoker/hunter/thief match 1:1 and need no alias.)
